content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

April 30, 2009

Lisa A. Foster
City Attorney
P.O. Box 789
Poway, CA 92074-0789

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-09-106

Dear Ms. Foster:

As we discussed on April 28, 2009, Commission staff is unable to provide written advice within the expedited time frame you required. As I explained, since the date of the decision has now passed, we are closing your request for advice consistent with Government Code Section 83114(b) and Regulation 18329(b)(8)(A)&(C), copy enclosed.

Should you have any questions, please feel free to contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel,
Legal Division

JWW:jgl

Enclosure
